Text:
The injury-plagued Indianapolis Colts lost another quarterback on Thursday but last year 's AFC finalists rallied together to shoot down the Philadelphia Eagles 37-10 in a showdown of playoff contenders .

Text:
Marshall Faulk rushed for 101 yards and two touchdowns and Jason Belser returned an interception 44 yards for a score as the Colts improved to 8-6 , the same mark as the Eagles , who lost for the fourth time in five games .

Extract named entities as JSON.

ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:

Text:
Ohio State left tackle Orlando Pace became the first repeat winner of the Lombardi Award Thursday night when the Rotary Club of Houston again honoured him as college football 's lineman of the year .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Pace , a junior , helped Ohio State to a 10-1 record and a berth in the Rose Bowl against Arizona State .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
He was the most dominant offensive lineman in the country and also played defensive line in goal-line situations .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Last year , Pace became the first sophomore to win the award since its inception in 1970 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Pace outdistanced three senior finalists -- Virginia Tech defensive end Cornell Brown , Arizona State offensive tackle Juan Roque and defensive end Jared Tomich of Nebraska .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
The Lombardi Award is presented to the college lineman who , in addition to outstanding effort on the field , best exemplifies the characteristics and discipline of Vince Lombardi , legendary coach of the Green Bay Packers .

Text:
Canada 's Bre-X Minerals Ltd and Barrick Gold Corp are to continue negotiations to hammer out a partnership agreement to develop the spectacular Busang gold find in Indonesia , sources close to the talks said on Friday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" The negotiations will be held both in Toronto and in Jakarta , " one source , speaking on condition of anonymity , told Reuters .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Another source said most of the key negotiators from both Bre-X and Barrick had returned to Toronto , but declined to say if there had been any progress in their negotiations .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Both sources said Bre-X and Barrick did not hold talks on Thursday with Mines and Energy Ministry Secretary-General Umar Said , who is coordinating the negotiations over the Busang find in East Kalimantan .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
The first source also said Bre-X had until December 21 to submit to the Indonesian Mines and Energy Ministry a feasibility study on the central region of the Busang property , estimated to contain 2.6 million ounces of gold .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
The richest parts of the property to the north and south of the central region have been estimated by Bre-X to contain 57 million ounces of gold .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" Bre-X is expected to complete the feasibility report by December 16 and submit it to the government before the December 21 deadline , " the source said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
He said Bre-X would then formally seek the permission of the Indonesian government to begin construction to develop Busang 's central region , which might take up to two years .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
The source declined to say if there had been any progress in the talks between Bre-X and Barrick .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" This is a huge project ...

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
we are not selling furniture , and Bre-X has 13,000 shareholders to answer to , " the source said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" While there has been some agreement in principle on some issues , there are still others such as procedures and mechanisms that needed to be sorted out , " he added .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
The source said no new deadline had been set by the Mines and Energy Ministry for Bre-X and Barrick to strike a deal .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
The Ministry had given the companies until December 4 to complete a partnership deal , and advised Bre-X to take a 25 percent stake and Barrick 75 percent to develop the property .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" As far as I am aware , there 's been no new deadline , " the source said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
The Ministry 's Umar said on Thursday that both Bre-X and Barrick had responded positively to a government letter recommending a 25-75 split in the Busang gold property .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
The government also wants 10 percent of the property .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Umar said the government had yet to receive a formal reply from the companies .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
He had said earlier that if the two companies failed to reach a partnership agreement , the government would explore other ways to expedite development of the Busang find .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Bre-X has a partnership deal with PT Panutan Duta of the Panutan Group run by President Suharto 's eldest son , Sigit Harjojudanto , under which Panutan would receive $ 40 million over 40 months plus a 10 percent stake Busang 's richest parts .

Extract named entities as JSON.

PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Barrick has teamed up with a construction company in the Citra Group of Suharto 's eldest daughter , Siti Hardianti Rukmana , in what Barrick had said was a partnership " to prepare us for a potential mining development project " .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Ramthan Hussain

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
SINGAPORE 1996-12-06

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Singapore 's winning campaign to host the World Trade Organisation ( WTO ) 's first ministerial meeting reflected its ambition to play a key role in shaping global free trade , the lifeblood of its economy , analysts said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" As one of the world 's most externally oriented economies , Singapore has a disproportionately large stake in the WTO , " said Desmond Supple , economist at research house I.D.E.A .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" Singapore stands to benefit more than most from continued global trade liberalisation as trade is the engine of its growth , accounting for nearly three times its gross domestic product . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
The city-state met U.S. opposition two years ago in its bid to host the meeting , expected to gather 4,000 officials from 160 countries from December 9 to 13 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
In a stand some analysts linked to controversy over Singapore 's caning of an American teenager for vandalism , then-U.S. Trade Representative Mickey Kantor had said the meeting ought to be held where the WTO was going to be headquartered .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
That would have meant Geneva .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
But Singapore had the support of other WTO members .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Derek da Cunha , senior fellow at the Institute of Policy Studies ( ISEAS ) , said Singapore 's hosting of the conference " carries a great deal of symbolism for the city-state , underscoring its commitment to free trade and its trading links across the globe . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
There is the international prestige Singapore would enjoy , but " more importantly there is a genuine national interest in fostering better global free trade and an open market " , said Tan Kong Yam , head of Business Policy at the National University of Singapore .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
At the ministerial meeting , trade ministers will review the work of the WTO and the implementation of the Uruguay Round free trade commitments under its predecessor the General Agreement on Tariffs and Trade ( GATT ) .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
In June , the WTO hailed Singapore for its open market policies but the European Union and other trading powers called on Singapore to speed up the opening of its services sector .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Supple said the struggle that Singapore had to wage in vying to host the meeting would be repeated during the talks .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" There is tension at every step of the way , " since a battle line between the West and developing countries has been drawn over the issue of linking trade liberalisation with labour rights , he said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Supple said hosting the meeting carried prestige for Singapore , " however , this is quite intangible as the prestige factor may not necessarily lead to any additional investment and trade flows to this region . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
From a commercial point of view , the meeting would be good for Singapore 's tourism industry , Tan said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
A large part of Singapore 's workforce would be mobilised to ensure the meeting would run without a glitch but the average Singaporean " would probably not be too concerned about some of the issues , " Tan said .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" But the more educated public will realise that these kind of things are important for Singapore as a small economy . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Supple said any political gains the Singapore government would get from the WTO meeting -- ahead of a general election due by April 1997 -- would depend on how successful it was in pushing its economic agenda .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" If there are any movements toward freer trade , then Singapore 's economy and the electorate would gain , " he said . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
But I do n't think it would be wise to play up the political aspect of this .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
I think political issues will take secondary importance to all these economic issues that will be displayed . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
South Africa 's trip to Kanpur for the third test against India has given former England test cricketer Bob Woolmer the chance of a sentimental return to his birthplace .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Woolmer was born in the northern city of Kanpur when his father worked there for an insurance compnay and was himself an active cricketer .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" It 's been a sentimental journey ...

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
A visit to India is always an intriguing experience , " Woolmer , now the South African coach , said on Saturday .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Woolmer , 48 , played 19 tests for England between 1975 and 1981 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
His first cricketing sojurn to India was as a member of Tony Greig 's England side in 1976-77 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
His father Clarence Woolmer represented United Province , now renamed Uttar Pradesh , in India 's Ranji Trophy national championship and captained the state during 1949 .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Now aged 86 , Woolmer senior lives with his son in Cape Town .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Woolmer 's memories of Kanpur are few and blurred .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" I do n't remember much of the place , " he said . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
I came here on zero and left at three ( aged three ) when my father was transferred to Calcutta where I spent another four and half years .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" But I do remember we had a cobra snake in the basement of our house .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Also that my father bought a bicycle and when we rode over a hose pipe it broke into two . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:
PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Woolmer said the hospital where he was born is close to the stadium where the India-South Africa test will be played .

Text:
World Cup ski officials hope to be able to get in at least one men 's downhill training run on Saturday in an effort to salvage the weekend racing programme .

Text:
For the third consecutive day , Friday 's scheduled training runs were cancelled due to heavy wet snow and fog on Whistler Mountain , leaving the scheduled World Cup events in jeopardy .

LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Rules call for at least one training run to be completed before a World Cup downhill race can be staged .

Extract named entities as JSON.

MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
Organisers hope to get that run in on Saturday morning , conditions permitting , and stage the race later in the day or on Sunday .

ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" There was no possibility today to make a training run , " said Bernd Zobel , the Canadian men 's national coach , citing too much new snow and poor visibility .

Text:

Text:

Text:

Extract named entities as JSON.

PER = person
ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:

ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:
" I 'd like to come over but there are a lot of things happening at home .

Extract named entities as JSON.

Definitions:

ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

I 've also got a contract to play for New South Wales in the Super 12 next year . "

Extract named entities as JSON.

" I 'm sure there are a few people in England who 'd be delighted to have David Campese in their club 's jersey , " he said .

ORG = organization
LOC = location
MISC = miscellaneous

Text:

Text:
